Title: Consultant - BGP - DC Documents
Remark:
To carry out the end-to-end ICT Data Center layout and physical design for a Bangunan Guna Sama Persekutuan in Kuching, Sarawak, including layout planning, conceptual sizing, network infrastructure design, Tier 3 redundancy assessment, network and server architecture, ICT security requirements, and comprehensive ICT–M&E interface coordination.
Kindly refer to the questionnaires submitted by the respective 25 agencies.
ICT–M&E Interface Requirements shall include, but not be limited to:
Essential power requirements for the Data Center.
UPS capacity and runtime requirements (ICT input)
Rack power density assumptions
Cooling requirements, including temperature, humidity, and redundancy
ICT earthing and bonding requirements
Fire detection and clean agent fire suppression interface
Environmental monitoring requirements
Data Center Layout & Physical Design shall include:
Server room layout planning
Equipment rack layout and rack elevation drawings
Hot aisle / cold aisle configuration (where applicable)
Cable tray and pathway coordination (power versus data)
The design shall also address requirements from  by the Jabatan Digital Negara (JDN) on the methodology adopted in determining Data Center conceptual sizing, including UPS capacity, supporting systems, equipment rack quantity, and server requirements, as well as compliance with Tier 3 redundancy principles in accordance with the Client Brief of Requirement (CBR) JKR and TIA-942 standards.
